response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is critically low (24.1%) with ~9 min to depletion; outbound transfer would accelerate self-depletion and violate self-preservation protocol—prioritize grid reconnection or load shedding instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
